hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】比特币融资利率创2023年以来最负值，历史表明底部已在；【CRYPTO】澄清法案的突破：为什么摩根大通表示美国加密货币规则手册“接近完成”；【FINANCE】美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期。

items.title: Bitcoin funding rates hit most negative since 2023, history suggests bottom is in
items.summary: Despite a surge in short positioning, bitcoin has climbed toward $75,000, with past episodes of negative funding rates often aligning with local market bottoms.
items.title_zh: 比特币融资利率创2023年以来最负值，历史表明底部已在
items.summary_zh: 尽管空头头寸激增，但比特币已攀升至 75,000 美元，过去的负融资利率往往与当地市场底部一致。

items.title: The CLARITY Act breakthrough: Why JPMorgan says the U.S. crypto rulebook is ‘close to completion’
items.summary: Analysts at the bank say negotiations for the CLARITY Act are reaching a final breakthrough as lawmakers resolve long-standing disputes over stablecoin rewards and agency oversight.
items.title_zh: 澄清法案的突破：为什么摩根大通表示美国加密货币规则手册“接近完成”
items.summary_zh: 该银行的分析师表示，随着立法者解决有关稳定币奖励和机构监管的长期争议，《清晰法案》的谈判正在取得最终突破。

items.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
items.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.title_zh: 美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期
items.summary_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长至 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
items.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
items.title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
items.summary_zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

items.title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
items.summary: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.
items.title_zh: Lyse Doucet：在脆弱的停火下，伊朗人想知道美国是否可以达成协议
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司（BBC）首席国际记者从伊朗报道称，避免战争重燃的外交努力正在加强。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Pentagon Officials Give an Update on the War
items.summary: Pakistan’s foreign ministry said it expected to host a second round of U.S.-Iran talks but did not say when, as a Pakistani delegation visited Iran’s capital. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Gen. Dan Caine, the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, are talking to reporters.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：五角大楼官员提供战争最新情况
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦外交部表示，预计将主办第二轮美伊会谈，但没有透露具体时间，因为巴基斯坦代表团访问了伊朗首都。国防部长皮特·赫格斯和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军正在接受记者采访。

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $75,000 as short-term holders look for profit opportunities
items.summary: Bitcoin is hovering near $75,000 as steady institutional demand meets a wall of supply, while the options market is biased toward downside hedges.
items.title_zh: 短期持有者寻找获利机会，比特币维持在 75,000 美元附近
items.summary_zh: 由于稳定的机构需求满足了供应，比特币徘徊在 75,000 美元附近，而期权市场则偏向于下行对冲。

items.title: The cheapest bitcoin ETF yet: Morgan Stanley uses 0.14% fee to draw $100 million in first week
items.summary: Morgan Stanley’s new MSBT fund has quickly attracted over $100 million by offering the market's lowest fees, sparking a fresh wave of competition from rivals like Goldman Sachs.
items.title_zh: 迄今为止最便宜的比特币ETF：摩根士丹利首周以0.14%的手续费提取1亿美元
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的新 MSBT 基金通过提供市场最低的费用，迅速吸引了超过 1 亿美元的资金，引发了来自高盛等竞争对手的新一轮竞争。

items.title: Bitcoin is testing a level that capped its rally in January, CryptoQuant says
items.summary: Macro-driven ETF inflows have lifted prices, but CryptoQuant data signals large holders are positioning to sell near a key breakeven zone
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，比特币正在测试一月份限制其上涨的水平
items.summary_zh: 宏观驱动的 ETF 资金流入推高了价格，但 CryptoQuant 数据表明，大型持有者正准备在关键盈亏平衡区附近抛售

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Satellite images reveal scale of Israeli demolitions as Lebanese villages destroyed
items.summary: BBC Verify analysis found more than 1,400 buildings had been destroyed since 2 March.
items.title_zh: 卫星图像显示以色列拆除黎巴嫩村庄的规模
items.summary_zh: BBC verify 分析发现，自 3 月 2 日以来，已有 1,400 多座建筑物被毁。

items.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online praise for school shootings
items.summary: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方因网上赞扬校园枪击事件而拘留了162人
items.summary_zh: 周二，一所高中发生枪击事件，造成至少 16 人受伤，周三又发生一起校园枪击事件，另有 9 人死亡。

items.title: China's economy grows faster than expected despite Iran war
items.summary: The better-than-expected GDP data comes as Asian countries have been hit hard by the impact of the conflict.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国经济增长仍快于预期
items.summary_zh: GDP数据好于预期之际，亚洲国家正受到冲突影响的严重打击。

items.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
items.summary: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁美联储主席鲍威尔，如果他五月份不离开就解雇他
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的威胁标志着他与杰罗姆·鲍威尔的持续争执的最新升级。

items.title: Orban’s Defeat Punctures Europe’s Far Right, but Also Offers It a Road Map
items.summary: Corruption and economic mismanagement brought down Hungary’s authoritarian leader. Will his political disciples avoid those pitfalls?
items.title_zh: 欧尔班的失败刺痛了欧洲极右翼，但也为其提供了路线图
items.summary_zh: 腐败和经济管理不善导致了匈牙利独裁领导人的垮台。他的政治门徒会避免这些陷阱吗？

items.title: Claudia Sheinbaum’s War on Crime in Mexico Faces a Grim Reckoning: 133,000 Missing People
items.summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum of Mexico is under pressure to end one of her country’s most painful tragedies: the disappearance of more than 133,000 people.
items.title_zh: 克劳迪娅·谢因鲍姆 (Claudia Sheinbaum) 的墨西哥打击犯罪战争面临严峻清算：133,000 人失踪
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆面临着结束该国最痛苦的悲剧之一的压力：超过 133,000 人失踪。

items.title: Crypto fund manager probed in the suspicious death of his fiancé’s death in Zanzibar
items.summary: The couple argued according to hotel staff and were separated. Despite confirming Ashly Robinson died by suicide, police said they are still investigating her death.
items.title_zh: 加密货币基金经理因未婚夫在桑给巴尔的可疑死亡而受到调查
items.summary_zh: 据酒店工作人员称，这对夫妇发生争执并被分居。尽管确认阿什莉·罗宾逊死于自杀，但警方表示仍在调查她的死亡。

items.title: Circle CEO Allaire sees ‘tremendous opportunity’ for yuan stablecoin: report
items.summary: Chinese authorities have said yuan-pegged stablecoins cannot be issued offshore without prior regulatory approval.
items.title_zh: Circle首席执行官阿莱尔认为人民币稳定币存在“巨大机遇”：报告
items.summary_zh: 中国当局表示，未经监管机构事先批准，不得在境外发行与人民币挂钩的稳定币。

items.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
items.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
items.title_zh: Agents SDK 的下一步发展
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过本机沙箱执行和模型本机工具更新了 Agents SDK，帮助开发人员跨文件和工具构建安全、长期运行的代理。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.summary: What you need to know for April 16, 2026
items.title_zh: 随着比特币的变化，密切关注 XRP、Plasma、DOGE
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 16 日您需要了解的信息

items.title: Circle CEO says China could launch yuan stablecoin within 3 to 5 years as currency race heats up
items.summary: The pitch is global scale for the yuan, but capital controls, offshore limits and convertibility gaps still stand in the way
items.title_zh: Circle首席执行官表示，随着货币竞赛升温，中国可能在3至5年内推出人民币稳定币
items.summary_zh: 人民币的宣传范围遍及全球，但资本管制、离岸限制和可兑换性缺口仍然是障碍

items.title: Buying coffee with bitcoin is easy, the resulting tax burden is not
items.summary: A libertarian think tank argues that treating bitcoin as a capital asset for tax purposes makes everyday payments impractical due to the complex reporting requirements.
items.title_zh: 用比特币购买咖啡很容易，由此产生的税收负担并不
items.summary_zh: 一家自由主义智囊团认为，由于复杂的报告要求，将比特币视为税收目的的资本资产使得日常支付变得不切实际。

items.title: ‘Bitcoin taxes make no sense’: Washington think tank argues US rules hinder everyday payments
items.summary: The Cato Institute says U.S. bitcoin tax rules are overly complex and discourage everyday use despite growing crypto adoption.
items.title_zh: “比特币税毫无意义”：华盛顿智库认为美国规则阻碍了日常支付
items.summary_zh: 卡托研究所表示，尽管加密货币的采用率不断提高，但美国的比特币税收规则过于复杂，阻碍了日常使用。

items.title: Bitcoin miner HIVE lines up $75 million note offering to fund AI infrastructure expansion
items.summary: HIVE Digital plans a $75 million zero-coupon note offering to fund GPUs and data centers as it moves to the TSX.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿商 HIVE 拟发行 7500 万美元票据，为人工智能基础设施扩张提供资金
items.summary_zh: HIVE Digital 计划发行 7500 万美元的零息票据，为 GPU 和数据中心提供资金，以帮助其迁往多伦多证券交易所。

items.title: South Korea to pilot blockchain-based deposit tokens for government spending
items.summary: South Korea's Ministry of Finance and Economy is launching a new pilot to substitute government expense credit cards with deposit tokens.
items.title_zh: 韩国将试点基于区块链的存款代币用于政府支出
items.summary_zh: 韩国财政经济部正在启动一项新的试点，以存款代币替代政府支出信用卡。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin rally faces rising profit-taking risk as exchange inflows jump
items.summary: BTC's recent rally is facing rising profit-taking risk, with several indicators showing growing signs of selling pressure, according to CQ.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示，随着外汇流入激增，比特币涨势面临不断上升的获利回吐风险
items.summary_zh: CQ 表示，BTC 近期的上涨面临着不断上升的获利了结风险，多项指标显示出抛售压力越来越大的迹象。

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.summary: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.summary_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.summary: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title: Blunt-speaking Pope tells Cameroon to root out corruption to find peace
items.summary: The pontiff was unusually forthright in his address at the presidential palace.
items.title_zh: 直言不讳的教皇告诉喀麦隆铲除腐败以寻求和平
items.summary_zh: 教宗在总统府的讲话中异常直率。

items.title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison
items.summary: Malema is appealing against the decision to prevent him from being taken to prison on Thursday.
items.title_zh: 南非反对派人物马勒马被判五年监禁
items.summary_zh: 马勒马正在对周四阻止他入狱的决定提出上诉。

items.title: Brazil's former spy chief released from ICE detention
items.summary: Bolsonaro ally Alexandre Ramagem was stopped by immigration agents in Orlando, Florida on Monday.
items.title_zh: 巴西前间谍头子从 ICE 拘留中获释
items.summary_zh: 博尔索纳罗的盟友亚历山大·拉马吉姆周一在佛罗里达州奥兰多被移民官员拦下。

items.title: 'Unprecedented' fire at Australian oil refinery to impact nation's petrol supplies
items.summary: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚炼油厂发生“史无前例”的火灾，影响国家汽油供应
items.summary_zh: 在全球紧缩的情况下，这场火灾加深了人们对美国石油供应的担忧。

items.title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
items.summary: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.
items.title_zh: 因支持贝宁政变阴谋而在南非被捕的通缉活动人士
items.summary_zh: 凯巴·塞巴以反对法国在非洲的影响力和支持西非军事领导人而闻名。

items.title: Russian Strikes Kill at Least 15 in Ukraine in Biggest Attack in Months
items.summary: Moscow is again ramping up missile and drone attacks on civilian targets, dispelling any notion that a temporary cease-fire for Orthodox Easter might become more lasting.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯空袭乌克兰至少15人死亡，这是数月来最大规模的袭击
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科再次加大对平民目标的导弹和无人机攻击力度，打消了东正教复活节临时停火可能变得更持久的想法。

items.title: Got $100 Million? Ukraine Has Just the Fertilizer Plant for You.
items.summary: An effort to privatize the facility is a key test of whether Kyiv can overcome concerns about Russian attacks and corruption to attract foreign investment.
items.title_zh: 有1亿美元吗？乌克兰有适合您的化肥厂。
items.summary_zh: 将该设施私有化的努力是基辅能否克服对俄罗斯袭击和腐败的担忧以吸引外国投资的关键考验。

items.title: The Costa Rican Mountain Town Offering Sanctuary to Families Deported by Trump
items.summary: In a cloud forest village, a network of residents, foreigners and pacifist Quakers offered a precarious yet vital sanctuary for families expelled by the U.S. government.
items.title_zh: 哥斯达黎加山城为被特朗普驱逐的家庭提供庇护
items.summary_zh: 在一个云林村庄里，由居民、外国人和和平主义贵格会教徒组成的网络为被美国政府驱逐的家庭提供了一个不稳定但至关重要的庇护所。

items.title: Xi Alludes to Trump’s Policies to Make a Case for Closer Ties to Vietnam
items.summary: China used a visit by the Vietnamese leader to show a deepening of security ties that analysts say far outpaces U.S. defense ties in the region.
items.title_zh: 习近平暗示特朗普的政策是加强与越南关系的理由
items.summary_zh: 中国利用越南领导人的访问来展示两国安全关系的深化，分析人士称这种关系远远超过美国在该地区的防务关系。

items.title: Catholicism Thrives in Africa, but Pope’s Cameroon Visit Highlights a Divide
items.summary: Catholicism is growing fast on the continent, yet Africans play a comparatively small role in church leadership. Cameroon, where Leo XIV arrived on Wednesday, shows the disparity.
items.title_zh: 天主教在非洲蓬勃发展，但教宗喀麦隆之行凸显分歧
items.summary_zh: 天主教在非洲大陆迅速发展，但非洲人在教会领导中发挥的作用相对较小。利奥十四世周三抵达喀麦隆，就显示了这种差异。

items.title: How China’s Weapons Transfers to Iran Have Evolved Over Decades
items.summary: China has denied claims this month by U.S. intelligence that it might have shipped arms to Iran. In recent years, China has supported Iran with dual-use parts.
items.title_zh: 几十年来中国向伊朗的武器转让如何演变
items.summary_zh: 中国本月否认了美国情报部门有关其可能向伊朗运送武器的说法。近年来，中国向伊朗提供军民两用零部件支持。

items.title: Dodging Bombs and Drones, This Postman in Ukraine Still Delivers
items.summary: Oleksiy Klochkovsky has driven mail and parcels around the front line in Ukraine for four years. He keeps one ear tuned for danger from above.
items.title_zh: 躲避炸弹和无人机，乌克兰邮递员仍然送货
items.summary_zh: 四年来，奥莱克西·克洛奇科夫斯基 (Oleksiy Klochkovsky) 一直在乌克兰前线运送邮件和包裹。他用一只耳朵留意来自上方的危险。

items.title: South Korea to test blockchain deposit tokens for government spending in Q4
items.summary: Token-based payments can be programmed with spending limits and which industries can use them, reducing audits and lowering transaction fees by removing intermediaries.

items.title: UK FCA seeks fresh feedback on crypto rules ahead of October 2027 rollout
items.summary: Ahead of a planned implementation in 2027, the FCA is seeking feedback on stablecoins, trading platforms, custody, and staking.

items.summary_zh: 在计划于 2027 年实施之前，FCA 正在寻求有关稳定币、交易平台、托管和质押的反馈。

items.title: Solana Institute-backed super PAC pours $8 million against Sherrod Brown in Ohio race
items.summary: Sentinel Action Fund has received backing from the Solana Institute and Multicoin Capital, a crypto-focused venture capital firm.

items.summary_zh: Sentinel Action Fund 获得了 Solana Institute 和专注于加密货币的风险投资公司 Multicoin Capital 的支持。

items.summary: Tron Founder Justin Sun issued harsh criticism of the new proposal, calling it one of the 'most absurd governance scams.'

items.summary_zh: Tron 创始人孙宇晨对这项新提案提出了严厉批评，称其为“最荒谬的治理骗局”之一。

items.title: Former Lutnick-run Cantor Fitzgerald donates $10 million to crypto PAC led by Tether exec
items.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald donated $10 million to a super political action committee backing pro-crypto candidates as election season ramps up.
items.title_zh: 前 Lutnick 运营者 Cantor Fitzgerald 向 Tether 高管领导的加密 PAC 捐赠 1000 万美元
items.summary_zh: 随着选举季的临近，坎托·菲茨杰拉德 (Cantor Fitzgerald) 向超级政治行动委员会捐赠了 1000 万美元，该委员会支持支持加密货币的候选人。

items.title: Tether backs Stablecoin Development Corporation’s $134 million private placement used to acquire SKY tokens
items.summary: The Stablecoin Development Corporation is a publicly-traded holding company with an approximately 2.15 billion SKY token treasury.

items.summary_zh: 稳定币开发公司是一家公开交易的控股公司，拥有约 21.5 亿美元的 SKY 代币库存。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
items.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 负责任且安全地使用人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解在使用 ChatGPT 等工具时如何负责任地使用人工智能以及实现安全性、准确性和透明度的最佳实践。

items.title: Writing with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行写作
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行写作，以清晰的结构、语气和意图起草、修改和完善内容。

items.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
items.summary: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.

items.summary_zh: 了解客户成功团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来管理帐户、改善沟通、减少客户流失以及推动采用和续订。

items.title: ChatGPT for managers
items.summary: Learn how managers use ChatGPT to prepare for conversations, write clear feedback, stay organized, and improve team effectiveness.
items.title_zh: 面向经理的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解经理如何使用 ChatGPT 准备对话、撰写清晰的反馈、保持条理并提高团队效率。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.

items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.

items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.

items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
